title: Duplicate group or board structure
excerpt: It would be great if there was a way to duplicate the structure of a board or group to be able to make a new board or move the structured group to a new board. This would be helpful for tracking boards by time, lets say …

posts.author: Joeymoto96 (Joey Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was a way to duplicate the structure of a board or group to be able to make a new board or move the structured group to a new board. This would be helpful for tracking boards by time, lets say weekly and not having to recreate an entire board with the same structure or automations each time.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Joeymoto96 ,
You can use the Duplicates and Uniques app to achieve that. Check out this video on how the copy functionality of the app works. If you need any help, you can write to support@kolaai.com and would be happy to walk you through.
